name: D-Zerta Final Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a deep, narrow-bottom bowl.
2. Whip the mixture with a rotary beater or electric mixer at high speed for 2 to 3 minutes, or until the topping is thick and fluffy. This yields approximately 4 cups when using two envelopes of d-zerta.
3. Store the prepared whipping topping in an airtight container in the refrigerator. Before serving, beat it again until fluffy, adding 1 tablespoon water if desired.
Recipe from the side of a box of "d-zerta" whipping mix.
